creator: ru@ucb.crimea.ua
text:
Hi!

Do you still have the Cyclom-Y adapter?
ISA or PCI? Which revision? Which SM (SM8/16 or SM8/16 II)?

Can you try the driver from Cyclades

ftp://ftp.cyclades.com/pub/cyclades/cyclom-y/freebsd/2.2.5/cyy225.tar.gz

and report whether you have any problems with it (silo overflows, etc)?

Thanks,
--
